recommendations.title: The Jacket
recommendations.genres: Drama, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A military veteran goes on a journey into the future, where he can foresee his death and is left with questions that could save his life and those he loves.

recommendations.title: Ghoulies
recommendations.overview: A young man and his girlfriend move into the man's old mansion home, where he becomes possessed by a need to control ancient demons.

recommendations.title: The Last Exorcism Part II
recommendations.overview: As Nell Sweetzer tries to build a new life, the evil force that once possessed her returns with an even more horrific plan.

recommendations.title: The Scary House
recommendations.overview: When a big-city family moves to a remote town, two young brothers and their new friends try to solve the menacing mystery that haunts their home.

recommendations.title: The Legend of the Nahuala
recommendations.overview: Leo San Juan, an insecure child of nine years old, lives eternally frightened by horror stories that Nando tells his older brother. Within these stories it is 'The Legend of Nahuala', according to which, an old abandoned Casona is possessed by the sp

recommendations.title: The Devil's Candy
recommendations.overview: A struggling painter is possessed by satanic forces after he and his young family move into their dream home in rural Texas.

recommendations.title: Day of the Dead: Bloodline
recommendations.overview: In a world overrun by zombies, military personnel and survivalists live in an underground bunker while they seek a cure.

recommendations.title: Mirrors
recommendations.overview: An ex-cop and his family are the target of an evil force that is using mirrors as a gateway into their home.

recommendations.title: Escape Room
recommendations.overview: Four friends who partake in a popular Los Angeles escape room find themselves stuck with a demonically possessed killer. They have less than an hour to solve the puzzles needed to escape the room alive.

recommendations.title: Gabriel
recommendations.overview: Gabriel tells the story of an archangel who fights to bring light back to purgatory - a place where darkness rules - and save the souls of the city's inhabitants.
